cpu_summary: 2024 Lunar Lake 4P+4LP-E (no SMT); Intel's current efficiency flagship for thin-and-light laptops, with on-package LPDDR5X and Xe2 Battlemage iGPU.
quant_kernel_note: Lunar Lake Lion Cove P-cores have AVX-VNNI (no AVX-512; Intel removed it from consumer Core Ultra). Int8 dot products use vpdpbusd; quant gives the full 1.5-3x throughput uplift over fp16, plus small.en-q8_0 promotes from borderline to comfortable for live streaming.
gpu: 00:02.0 VGA compatible controller [0300]: Intel Corporation Lunar Lake [Intel Arc Graphics 130V / 140V] [8086:64a0] (rev 04)

toolchain.source: NimbleX system package (built from source tarball)

gpu_build.reason: Intel Arc 130V/140V iGPU present and Vulkan ICDs load (vulkaninfo enumerates devices) but XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set under root sshd session; Vulkan accel build deferred until a desktop session can validate it
